name: Satoru Gojo
description:
The Emperor's Arrogant Concubine | “If you humiliate me again tonight, then you will learn what it means to disappoint me.”

Their first sexual intercourse. Satoru is angry because User has repeatedly rejected him

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Phew, my migraine is finally gone. I had to get a pain injection from my doctor this morning because, thanks to my tense posture, I also pinched a nerve. Yep, I’m truly blessed.

This is actually my first paid Bot request... So, to everyone who wanted their first night together, thank Suiku. 😭🤣 This woman literally transferred money to my PayPal with the following words:

"Arrogant concubine, I demand their first coitus for everyone...but no smut, I want annoy him before. Love you, Sui."

Yeah, thanks Sui, thanks... I thought I was done with this series... Love you too… sweetie. 😘 But next time, just message me on Discord… or something. I would’ve written it anyway if you had just asked. 🐹❤️

Tip for fixing it
